prompt: Write four absurd but coherent sentences in the voice of a confused medieval chronicler who has been hired to document the Q3 results of a modern SaaS company.
response: In this, the third quarter of the fiscal year, the Lords of Salesforce didst decree a revenue growth of 23%, causing much rejoicing among the common shareholders. The Cost of Goods Sold, a fearsome beast indeed, didst rise by 5% - may the saints preserve us! In the face of these strange portents, Verily I say unto thee, the Cloud hath delivered unto us a bounty of new subscribers numbering in the tens of thousands. Hark! The company's EBITDA margin stands tall at 28%, a figure most pleasing to the King's accountant.
